events.name: Green Bay Packers at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — Jordan Love and the Green Bay Packers made just enough plays to squeeze out yet another win over the Chicago Bears.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan Love runs for go-ahead TD and Packers beat Bears on Karl Brooks' FG block at buzzer

headlines.description: — Jared Goff stood on the sideline wearing a baseball cap in the fourth quarter while his teammates finished off another rout.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jared Goff and NFC-leading Lions score at will in 52-6 win over Jaguars

headlines.description: — Sam Darnold lost a fumble on the Minnesota Vikings' third offensive play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Darnold leads Vikings to 3rd straight win, beating Titans 23-13

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — Jonnu Smith ran a couple of yards downfield and waved his left arm to get Tua Tagovailoa's attention.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tagovailoa throws 3 TDs to lead Dolphins past Raiders 34-19 for Miami's 2nd straight win

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Rams gave up a field goal to see their lead cut to four points, then clanged a kick off the right upright as the first half expired.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford throws for 4 TDs, 2 to Kupp and 1 to Nacua, to lead Rams past Patriots 28-22

events.name: Cleveland Browns at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Tayson Hill couldn't hide his irritation over two early turnovers against the Cleveland Browns, so New Orleans Saints interim coach Darren Rizzi took a moment to address it.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taysom Hill runs for 3 TDs as the Saints top Jameis Winston and the struggling Browns 35-14

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Anthony Richardson was back as the Indianapolis Colts' starting quarterback — and played as though he intends to never leave the huddle again.
headlines.shortLinkText: Richardson's late TD run leads Colts to a 28-27 victory over Rodgers and the Jets

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens still haven’t figured out how to beat the Pittsburgh Steelers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens' Jackson and the NFL's top-ranked offense fail to stop AFC North rival Steelers -- again

headlines.description: — Bo Nix set career bests by completing 85% of his passes for 307 yards and four touchdowns Sunday. Yet it was Javonte Williams' 14-yard touchdown run that really delighted the Denver Broncos' rookie quarterback.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bo Nix throws 4 touchdown passes and the Broncos roll past the Falcons 38-6

headlines.description: — Geno Smith scampered past the tired San Francisco defense for the go-ahead score in the closing seconds and struck the iconic Stephen Curry "night night" pose.
headlines.shortLinkText: Geno Smith's late TD run leads the Seahawks past the 49ers 20-17

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed...
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Jim Harbaugh and the Los Angeles Chargers finally have their signature win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chargers beat Bengals 34-27 on Dobbins' late TD after squandering 21-point lead
